name: Vic Juris
abstract: Victor Edward Jurusz Jr. (September 26, 1953 – December 31, 2019), known professionally as Vic Juris, was an American jazz guitarist.

concerts.label: Christmas with Martha Lorin and Diane Delin

works.t: The Best is Yet to Come
I'm Gonna Sit Right Down and Write Myself a Letter
Sally: Look for the Silver Lining
Lady, be Good!: Oh, Lady, Be Good!
My Fair Lady: On the Street Where You Live
You Are All the World to Me

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: the other band that I’ve had since ’91, with Vic Juris, Tony Marino, Jamey Haddad for 10 years... that band’s still going with Tony and Vic and Marco now
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Gene Bertoncini
about_quotes.evidence: I took Vic Juris’ place, because the king got too busy. ... I love the way he plays. He’s working with the heavies too, David Liebman and Phil Woods and so, a monster player. So I’m honored to be there for him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gene Bertoncini interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2001
